name: ENERPAC TOOL GROUP CORP
business: Enerpac Tool Group Corp. provides high pressure hydraulic tools, controlled force products, and solutions for precise positioning of heavy loads. The company serves customers in more than 100 countries through its Industrial Tools & Services segment, which designs, manufactures, and distributes branded hydraulic and mechanical tools. Additionally, the company operates Cortland Biomedical, a biomedical textile product development business.

exposures.sentence: IT&S segment is primarily engaged in the design, manufacture and distribution of branded hydraulic and mechanical tools and in providing services and tool rental to the refinery/petrochemical; general industrial; industrial MRO; machining & manufacturing; power generation; infrastructure; mining; and other markets.
